positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial map featuring glowing constellation lines connecting abstract cosmic symbols (e.g., moons, stars, planets, mythical beasts). The composition is symmetrical and centered, designed for a circular or square print. Use deep indigo and cosmic teal as primary colors, accented by neon gold and iridescent silver highlights. The style should blend Art Nouveau ornamentation with modern geometric vector art. Focus on clean silhouettes and strong contrast, making the glowing elements pop against a dark void background. Ensure high resolution for scalable apparel printing, with visible, clean linework and perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, smudges, grunge, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, abstract chaos, photorealism, deep background depth of field
